title: GABRIEL MAGNUS -
content:
GABRIEL MAGNUS -
PRINCESS VICTORIA
BOO
MADISON
BOJACK


Main Narrative Movements:

  1. L is told to try and find some handy work to make some money
  2. L drafts a poster for dog walking while on recess from school, she watches all the kids play, but doesn’t join in.
  3. L puts up posters around town.
  4. L’s parents leave for the weekend and she spends time with SHEEN who agrees to babysit her—it is made obvious to the audience that SHEEN has an opiate addiction and has shady characters showing up at her apartment, all the while hiding L from the shadiness.
  5. L convinces locals to let her walk and care for their dogs. She spends time vetting emails. She encounters the locals and the audience gets introduced to them. Gives the dogs bath, they have ‘gossip’ sessions.
  6. L spends time getting pulled around by the dogs, they lead her to some unknown places.
  7. L is paid via a forced dinner with BARB and HUGH. L spies SHEEN getting into a car.
  8. L is bullied online
  9. L’s parents talk to the principal of the school, she gets victim blamed for being strange
